title: sehima ciliaris
intro: Sehima ciliaris, also known as the 'Bhagirathi grass' or 'Bhagirathi grasshopper grass', is a type of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and various skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sehima ciliaris include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of Sehima ciliaris typically involve making a paste or decoction from its leaves and roots, which are then used topically or orally for medicinal purposes.
